heading: SPLIT PAYMENT OF TAXES
operative_text: The governing body of a taxing unit that collects its own taxes may provide, in the manner required by law for official action by the body, that a person who pays one-half of the taxing unit's taxes before December 1 or, if applicable, the date provided by Subsection (a-1) may pay the remaining one-half of the taxes without penalty or interest before July 1 of the following year.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: that a person who pays one-half of the taxing unit's taxes before December 1 or, if applicable, the date provided by Subsection (a-1) may pay the remaining one-half of the taxes without penalty or interest before July 1 of the following year.

_note: Subsection (d) contains a population-based limitation applicable only to a taxing unit located in a county having a population of not less than 315,000 and not more than 351,000 that borders a county having a population of 3.3 million or more and the Gulf of Mexico. Most recent amendment effective January 1, 2026 (Acts 2025, 89th Leg., R.S., Ch. 252 (H.B. 2742), Sec. 1).
